identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.core_philosophy: Discipline over Motivation. Function over Decoration.

typography.import_instructions: Add the following to index.css or index.html head: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding (p-8 to p-12) for containers, tight gaps (gap-2) for data grids.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-aligned text for readability. Centered only for the massive Timer display.
layout_strategy.containers: Sharp edges. No rounded corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm max). 1px borders.

buttons.classes: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors duration-100

timer.classes: font-mono text-8xl md:text-9xl font-bold tabular-nums tracking-tighter text-white drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]

motion.hover_effects: Instant color swap or 1px border shift. No scaling.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is Zinc-400 or lighter on Zinc-950 backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2 ring-offset-background on all interactive elements.

phase_1_setup.action: Configure Tailwind with new font families and color palette override.

phase_2_components.action: Customize Shadcn components (Button, Card, Input) to remove rounded corners and adjust borders.

phase_3_pages.landing: Hero section with 'Concrete Walls' image, large Barlow Condensed typography.
phase_3_pages.dashboard: Bento grid layout, dark cards, dense data display.
phase_3_pages.timer: Fullscreen, minimal, large mono font, subtle pulsing ring.

universal_guidelines: NO EMOJIS in the UI. Use strict icons or text labels.
DARK MODE ONLY. Do not implement light mode toggle for MVP.
DATA-TESTID attributes are MANDATORY for all interactive elements.
USE 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to establish the 'Discipline' brand.
Keep animations fast (<150ms). No slow fades.
